concerns.text: Edge Case: 'What if I² heterogeneity exceeds 75%? → Moderator analysis is automatically triggered...' has NO matching task. The tasks list (T030-T039) covers meta-analysis, bias tests, and plots, but lacks any task to implement the 'moderator analysis engine' or the logic to trigger it based on I² > 75%.

FR-005 mandates: 'If asymmetry is detected... the system MUST consider trim-and-fill adjustment... and report the adjusted effect size.' Task T033 implements the algorithm, but no task explicitly covers the logic to 'report the adjusted effect size' in the final PDF or data output, creating a gap between the requirement's output condition and the task's deliverable.

FR-006 requires leave-one-out analysis 'IF N ≥ 10'. Task T034 implements the analysis but lacks a specific task to implement the conditional check 'IF N ≥ 10' before execution, risking violation of the conditional requirement.

FR-001 requires manual CSV fallback to contain specific metadata fields (DOI, year, etc.). Task T012 implements the builder/fallback, but no task exists to validate that the *manual* CSVs actually contain these required fields before processing, risking silent failure.

US2 Acceptance Scenario 1 requires citing 'Hedges & Olkin, 1985' in the output. Task T022 implements the formula, but no task ensures this citation is written to the `computation_method` or `formula_reference` fields in the output CSV or report.
